content: Travel itinerary data model: core entities are User, Itinerary, ItineraryDay, PlaceVisit, Place. Place is a normalized table caching Google Places API data (placeId, name, address, lat, lng, openingHours JSON, visitDuration). Itinerary has title, userId, totalDays, shareToken (UUID for public sharing), isPublic, createdAt. ItineraryDay has itineraryId, dayNumber, date, startTime, endTime. PlaceVisit has itineraryDayId, placeId, orderIndex, scheduledStart, scheduledEnd, notes. Sharing: generate UUID shareToken, public URL /share/[shareToken] bypasses auth check. Row Level Security on Supabase enforces owner-only write, owner/public-link read.
